title: Keep the main story horizontal
summary: The core path should be complete on its own. Detours add confidence without becoming required reading.

cards.title: Complete path
cards.body: Each core slide advances the narrative even when vertical slides are skipped.

cards.title: Current reference
cards.body: Authoring uses the selected slide as the anchor for add and remove actions.

cards.title: Detour cue
cards.body: Presentation mode can show that optional detail exists below this slide.

resources.label: Down arrow
resources.body: Open the authoring detail detour attached to this slide.
